data.name: Mr. Sushil Sharma
data.bio: A meticulous and detail-oriented strategist with a deep understanding of business operations has collected over 15 years of experience in various domains. He has a wide background in areas, including real estate, sales and marketing, and IT staffing. His protean experience has made him achieve the positions of Managing Director at CureTech Services and President of sales and marketing at Digital Hub Solutions and a known name in SAR Propbuild. His fresh perspective and boundless creativity are driving the project forward.
